title: Bots Modpack
body:
This modpack is focused on building and explortaion/machining

This is for people who enjoy using the create mod and automating systems in their world. After which you can dive into other mods like AD-Astra. Also includes controller/steamdeck/VR support 

**FEATURED MODS**
- CREATE
- AD-ASTRA
- FARMERS DELIGHT
- ViveCraft


Feel free to contact me on discor @Thatbotguy for any help or additions youd like
